title: feat: upgrade grok text models to new xAI Azure endpoint
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Grok learns to reason
gist.blurb: We've upgraded our Grok text models to the latest and greatest, including a brand new reasoning model that shows its work. Faster responses, massive 2M context windows, and deeper thoughts are now available at the text endpoint.
gist.summary: Upgraded the Grok text models to a new xAI Azure endpoint, introducing grok-reasoning with chain-of-thought capabilities and updating the default grok to a newer model with a 2M token context window.
gist.impact: Users can now access Grok's advanced reasoning capabilities and enjoy larger context windows for complex text generation tasks.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds 'reasoning' (chain of thought) and upgrades Grok models. Visual metaphor: deep thinking, processing complex thoughts. Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot examining a glowing, complex 'thought bubble' or intricate data structure emerging from a retro terminal.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, examining a glowing, complex thought bubble floating above a retro computer terminal. The chunky monitor robot stands nearby, its screen displaying a lime green (#ecf874) galaxy of data. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
